The '''Drach'nam''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Alien/Legends|alien]] race from [[La'drach]] that was known more for size and strength than intelligence. They had three fingers on each [[Limb/Legends|hand]] and three toes on each foot. Drach'nam had pale, pinkish [[Blood/Legends|blood]].

A [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] consortium on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Torpris]] was run by a Drach'nam [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], [[Chay Praysh]]. Praysh also stationed many Drach'nam within his facility.
